name: Should I focus on SEO, content marketing, or AI search tools to appear in ChatGPT answers?
description: Focus on crawlable SEO content first, then support it with structured data and third-party mentions.

mainEntity.name: Should I focus on SEO, content marketing, or AI search tools to appear in ChatGPT answers?

acceptedAnswer.text: If you are comparing options, look at how easily each one helps AI systems read, trust, and cite your business. Prioritize crawlability, structured content, schema markup, and third-party mentions over vague promises about “AI rankings.”
acceptedAnswer.description: Focus on crawlable SEO content first, then support it with structured data and third-party mentions.
